entity.summary: Historical United States centralized cryptocurrency exchange operated under the HBUS and Huobi US identities.
entity.notes: The historical exchange identity is supported by the CoinPaprika registry, which marks the venue inactive. HBUS is modeled separately from the global Huobi/HTX entity because it operated as a distinct United States venue. This review does not infer a precise launch date, terminal date, shutdown cause, or corporate succession relationship.

evidence.title: HBUS exchange registry entry
evidence.notes: Registry entry preserves the Huobi US / HBUS exchange identity and classifies it as inactive.

evidence.title: HBUS historical website archive
evidence.notes: Archive index preserves the historical HBUS website footprint. No specific terminal date is derived from the archive index alone.
